calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:59am and concluding at 10:20am.

Attorney for Plaintiff Dominique Angelo appeared via zoom.
Defendant NAVA Health MD., Inc. not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff.s witness RYAN KLUFT via zoom and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff NAVA Health MD, and against Defendant NAVA Health MD, as follows:

Damages: $86,484.00
Prejudgment Interest: $4,548.80
Attorney Fees: $2,375.00
Costs: $626.55

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $94,034.35

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
